title: Field drive — sovereign index, TimeShift, soft archival
motto: Every file has a place in time. We index once, know exactly now, and step back without heat.

timeshift.host_bridge: timeshift-gtk optional — field receipts remain audit spine

soft_delete.statement: Hard delete produces heat from another's work. We vault, timestamp, and leave lineage intact.

valuable_values.statement: Settable per file type. Under disk pressure, eat less valuable soft vault bytes first — smoothly, with eaten ledger.

filesystem_update.statement: Warn as disk fills. Listed deletes overwrite before bin. Catalog keeps destroyed date when bytes are gone.
